name: Meimei
description: Meimei is one of the Three Princesses of Verdigris Hall. She started as Fenshen's apprentice and, being somewhat cunning herself, inherited Fenshen's taste for strategy board games. She is the most attached to the brothel and the people within.

name: Meme
description: A character that appeared in a Japanese music video ME!ME!ME!.

name: Meneldor
description: Meneldor is a half-elf outcast and most loyal friend of William. He was previously an adventurer and hunter. He is a half-elf a mix race between humans and elves. His hair is silver that is tied up into a ponytail and his eyes are the colours of jade. Meneldor was born in Grassland to the north, in the Great Forest of Erin where the elves live. Because of his mixture of elf and human blood he was an outcast and couldn't get along with any of the residents, he later decide to run away and become
mediaTitles: The Faraway Paladin: The Lord of Rust Mountains

name: Miyuki Kobayakawa
description: __Height:__ 160cm Miyuki is Natsumi's partner and roommate. Miyuki is not as physically tough as Natsumi, but she is much smarter and more polite. A technical genius, Miyuki frequently performs custom vehicle modifications for various people at the precinct, as well as being an expert with computers. Miyuki is a superb driver, almost as daring as Natsumi, and very difficult to shake in a pursuit . She is also punctual, shy and diligent – in contrast to Natsumi, who is tardy, brash and freq
mediaTitles: You're Under Arrest! The Motion Picture

name: Mokona Modoki
description: A replica of a dimensional god Mokona made by Clow Reed and Yuuko. Soel was created specifically for Sakura, as a countermeasure for certain events foretold to happen in her journey by Clow Reed. It is "the thing" given to the Tsubasa crew as a means to travel between dimensions. Soel is more energetic and cheerful than her counterpart, Black Mokona, Larg. Soel likes to tease the Tsubasa team members, especially Kurogane. Soel's main functions include dimensional travel, universal translator and

name: Mori Ougai
description: Ougai is talented and charismatic, being a novelist, translator, and army surgeon. Having lived abroad, he’s more open to new things than the average Japanese person of that era. He lives in the same mansion with Hishida Shunsou. He’s charismatic, romantic and very gentleman-like, although quite persistent when he wants to be. Also, as Shunsou puts it, a weirdo as well.

name: Nico Vorgeil
description: Member no. 8 of the Round Table. He is the smartest member of The Union. Nico is married to Ichico Nemuri and has a daughter with her, Mico Vorgeil.

name: Nina
description: An orphan girl who lived outside Fortuna Castle with unusual lapis lazuli colored eyes.

name: Noël Kannagi
description: The mechanic and driver. Taciturn. She spends most of her time repairing the Takemikazuchi.

name: Otohiko
description: __Height:__ 183 cm (6'0") Otohiko is the Wind God, and dresses up as a woman. He has feelings for Ookuninushi. Him and [Mikage](https://anilist.co/character/37871/Mikage) are close friends.

name: Pinako Rockbell
description: __Occupation:__ Surgeon, Automail Technician Grandmother of Winry, and old resident of Risembool. Also, a parent like figure to both Edward and Alphonse, after they lost their mother. It is shown that Pinako was Hohenheim's drinking buddy, and that she was the one to introduce Hohenheim with his future wife, Trisha.

name: Ranmaru Kurosaki
description: **Height:** 182 cm **Instrument:** Bass The senpai of Masato Hijirikawa and Ren Jinguuji.

name: Ranta
description: __Race:__ Human __Height:__ 168cm, 170cm (Volume 11) __Class:__ Dark Knight The Dark Knight of the group. He is brash, impulsive, and somewhat perverted, which leads him to constantly arguing with Haruhiro. Ranta is the troublemaker of the group constantly causing problems and making rash decisions for he has a slight hint of arrogance in his character.
mediaTitles: Grimgar of Fantasy and Ash OVA 2.5

name: Shinichi Mechazawa
description: One of the most notorious delinquents of Cromartie. Though he is a robot, no one but the main characters seems to notice, including himself. Other delinquents rely on him and he gives good advice. Mechazawa is bad with machines: "Why are you bringing ME your electronics? I want to help you guys in any way I can -- even if I gotta put my life on the line! But when it comes to MACHINES, I'm helpless myself." From the character profile: People seem to find this robot deliquent a bit unbelievable; h

name: Suzume Yosano
description: Suzume grew up in the countryside most of her life until her father's work made him and Suzume's mother leave the country. They leave her in the care of her uncle who lives in Tokyo and owns a restaurant. She meets Shishio randomly at the bus stop and discovers that he is her uncle's friend and her teacher. name: Tank
description: Shadow of an ice bear that Jinwoo encountered during the Red Gate Incident.
mediaTitles: Solo Leveling Season 2 -Arise from the Shadow-

name: Tearju Lunatique
nativeName: ティアーユ・ルナティーク
description: __Height:__ 155 cm In Black Cat: A renowned nanotechnology and biology researcher with an IQ over 200, Dr. Tearju is the source of Eve's DNA. Although she is the human Eve was cloned from, Tearju's eye color is green while Eve's is violet.

name: Tsumugu Kinagase
description: A member of the organization called Nudist Beach whose main purpose is to rid the world of Life Fibers.

name: Xiao Liu
description: __Height:__ 183 cm Liu Xiao is the younger brother of Liu Min and the second son in the Liu family. He met Li Tianchen by chance when they were both children. Later on, he left to study abroad and finished his studies, returning to China a few months after the events of Liu Min's passing and the Li Tianchen incident. Soon after, he met with Li Tianchen again and stated his plan to "bring more parallel lines together"

name: Yomotsu Hirasaka
description: Yomotsu Hirasaka is a blind man who makes use of a tape recorder that he dubs the "Justice" diary, where it records the wrong-doings of future events he thinks need correcting. It's a pretty misleading name since Yomotsu considers the evil deeds committed by a religion cult as much of an injustice as finding random trash on the floor. His diary's actual functions are actually similar to the Sixth's "Thousand League Eyes," but rather it's the "Thousand League Hearing." He is able to create illusi

name: Arashi Nikaidou
description: Saint Liliana High School student attending the 2nd year and the President of the Student Council, Arashi has a ponytail and is seen often wearing an eye-patch on her right eye. Under the eye-patch is usually a red-colored contact lens. She is also seen often carrying a real katana. She is also known to not wear any underwear at all. mediaTitles: Onii-chan Dakedo Ai Sae Areba Kankeinai yo ne

name: Arlong
description: __Height:__ 263 cm (8'7") A sawshark fish-man. He was the pirate captain of the all fishman crew, the Arlong Pirates, a former member of the Sun Pirates, and the older brother of [Madam Shyarly](https://anilist.co/character/40274). He is known for being the main villain in the Arlong Arc and had the highest bounty in East Blue before being defeated by [Monkey D. Luffy](https://anilist.co/character/40).
